articles.title: Gold From Neutron Stars
articles.teaser: Every gold atom you've touched was forged in the collision of two dead stars.

articles.title: The Pitch Drop Experiment
articles.teaser: The world's slowest experiment: a drop falls once a decade, and for 90 years no one ever saw it happen.

articles.title: The Antikythera Mechanism
articles.teaser: A hand-cranked bronze computer that predicted eclipses — built 2,000 years before the microchip.

articles.title: The Living Light
articles.teaser: Roughly 76% of deep-sea animals make their own light — to hunt, to hide, and to vanish.

articles.title: Benford's Law
articles.teaser: Why the digit 1 begins about 30% of all real-world numbers — and how it catches fraud.
